title: Ontologia Event
description: Entity-scoped event from the ontologia event bus. Every event is a complete audit record: who changed, what changed, from what, to what. Events are persisted as append-only JSONL.

event_type.description: Event type constant (e.g., entity.created, name.added, entity.renamed)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred

subject_entity.description: UID of the entity this event concerns (null for system-level events)

previous_value.description: Value before the change (type varies by event)

new_value.description: Value after the change (type varies by event)
